mapper.sql: id, title, source_url, video_url, status, latency_ms, page_title, remark, group_id, episode_number, is_cached, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_collection (title, source_url, video_url, status, latency_ms, page_title, remark, group_id, episode_number) VALUES (#{title}, #{sourceUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{status}, #{latencyMs}, #{pageTitle}, #{remark}, #{groupId}, #{episodeNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video_collection WHERE source_url = #{sourceUrl} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE video_collection SET remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE video_collection SET video_url = #{videoUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE video_collection SET page_title = #{pageTitle}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE video_collection SET is_cached = #{isCached}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM video_collection WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM video_collection WHERE status IN (0, 2) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM video_collection WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY
episode_number created_at
DESC ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE video_collection SET group_id = #{groupId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE video_collection SET episode_number = #{episodeNumber}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(episode_number) FROM video_collection WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_collection WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
